news.headline: RBI Keeps Repo Rate Unchanged at 6.50% Amid Service-Sector Inflation Fears
news.description: The Reserve Bank of India decided to keep the benchmark repo rate unchanged at 6.50% in its latest policy meet, stressing ongoing vigilance over service-sector inflation and capital flows.

news.headline: Rupee Plummets to Record Low Against USD Amid Global Oil Price Surge
news.description: Rising tensions in the Middle East have driven global Brent crude oil prices up by 9%. This commodity shock has put severe pressure on the Indian Rupee, driving it to a record low and testing Forex reserves.

news.headline: SEBI Launches Investigation on High Leverage Derivatives Trading Liquidity
news.description: The Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) has announced a tightening of regulations on retail options trading, causing trading volumes to slide and banking liquidity margins to compress.

news.headline: State-Sponsored Ransomware Hits Indian Power Grid Network Infrastructure
news.description: A sophisticated zero-day cyber-exploit targeted a state-level power distribution control node. Although clearing operations remained isolated, emergency cyber-defence measures have been initiated nationwide.

news.headline: Nifty IT Index Surges 4% Following Blockbuster Earnings from TCS & Infosys
news.description: A massive spending rebound on AI integration projects has driven double-digit earnings growth for major Indian IT export leaders, sending TCS and Infosys shares to record highs.
